allow: PowerShell($health = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/health"; Write-Host "Health: $\($health.status\)"; $perfil = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/perfil"; Write-Host "Perfil: nombre=$\($perfil.nombre\) riesgo=$\($perfil.claseRiesgo\) configurado=$\($perfil.configurado\)"; $comp = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/completados"; Write-Host "Completados: $\($comp.Count\) estandares"; $docs = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/documentos"; Write-Host "Documentos: $\($docs.PSObject.Properties.Count\) registros"; $cal = Invoke-RestMethod "http://localhost:3001/api/calendario"; Write-Host "Calendario: $\($cal.PSObject.Properties.Count\) completadas")
